ValidationRule.description: The field Reason For Closing Deal must be appropriately populated before changing status to Closed/Lost.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Deal_Status__c, 'Closed - Lost'), NOT( OR( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Reason_For_Closing_Deal__c, 'Won deal with another operator'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Reason_For_Closing_Deal__c, 'Declined to pursue'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Reason_For_Closing_Deal__c, 'Airline awarded deal to competitor'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Reason_For_Closing_Deal__c, 'Airline cancelled opportunity'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Reason_For_Closing_Deal__c, 'Deal on hold by airline')
) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Change the Reason For Closing Deal to an appropriate option before moving the Status to 'Closed - Lost'
